title: Returning Goods 退换货
scene: Emma发现买的衣服尺码不合适，去退换。

lines.en: Excuse me, I bought this shirt here last week.
lines.zh: 打扰一下，我上周在这里买了这件衬衫。

lines.en: Is there a problem with it?
It's too small for me. Can I exchange it for a larger size?
lines.zh: 太小了。我能换一件大一号的吗？

lines.en: Of course. Do you have the receipt?
Yes, here is the receipt. I haven't worn it. The tags are still on.
lines.zh: 有的，这是收据。我没穿过。标签还在。

lines.en: Great! Let me check if we have the same shirt in a larger size.
lines.zh: 太好了！让我看看有没有同款大一号的。

lines.en: Thank you! I really like the design of this shirt.
lines.zh: 谢谢！我真的很喜欢这件衬衫的款式。

lines.en: Here it is! Size large. Would you like to try it on?
lines.zh: 找到了！大号的。您想试穿吗？

lines.en: Yes, please... It fits perfectly this time!
Wonderful! I'll process the exchange for you right away.
lines.zh: 太好了！我马上帮您办理换货。
